modernization.description: First hull under construction with advanced catapult and arrestor systems integration, extensive trials program planned for aviation systems validation
modernization.impact: Establishes baseline capability for PLAN amphibious aviation operations

modernization.description: Development of dedicated fixed-wing aircraft variants for Type 076 operations, including potential J-35 naval variant and specialized AEW aircraft
modernization.impact: Creates comprehensive organic air power for amphibious operations

vulnerabilities.description: Dual-role design creates significant training and operational complexity, requiring crews skilled in both amphibious and carrier operations simultaneously
vulnerabilities.context: PLAN lacks operational experience with catapult-equipped ships and simultaneous amphibious/aviation operations
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Extensive training programs and potential foreign expertise acquisition

vulnerabilities.description: Smaller flight deck and hangar compared to dedicated carriers limits sustained air operations and aircraft maintenance cycles
vulnerabilities.context: Compromised design trades aviation capacity for amphibious capability, potentially limiting effectiveness in high-intensity scenarios
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Planned integration with larger carrier task forces and shore-based aviation

vulnerabilities.description: Heavy reliance on unproven Chinese EMALS technology for critical launch operations, with no backup steam systems
vulnerabilities.context: Even US Navy has faced significant EMALS reliability issues on Ford-class carriers
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Extensive testing program and potential system redundancy improvements

vulnerabilities.description: Limited long-range air defense systems compared to major surface combatants, relies on escort vessels and organic aircraft
vulnerabilities.context: High-value target requiring significant escort in contested environments
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Designed for integration with Type 055 destroyers and comprehensive task force air defense

operational_patterns.typical_deployment: Amphibious ready group flagship with integrated air wing, likely Taiwan Strait and South China Sea operations
operational_patterns.typical_task_group: Escorted by Type 055 destroyers, Type 054A frigates, Type 075 LHDs, and support vessels
operational_patterns.readiness_notes: Significant training and workup period expected due to revolutionary design complexity

peer_comparisons.key_differences: Type 076 adds catapults and arrestor gear for conventional aircraft operations, while America-class is optimized for VTOL aircraft. Type 076 sacrifices some well deck space for aviation facilities.
peer_comparisons.video_angle: First catapult-equipped amphibious ship vs proven VTOL-optimized design - revolutionary vs evolutionary approaches

peer_comparisons.key_differences: Type 076 maintains significant amphibious capability with smaller aviation capacity, while QE-class is pure aircraft carrier. Type 076 uses catapults vs ski-jump configuration.
peer_comparisons.video_angle: Hybrid amphibious-carrier vs dedicated light carrier - multi-role flexibility vs specialized capability

peer_comparisons.key_differences: Type 076 designed from outset for fixed-wing operations with catapults, while Izumo is helicopter carrier converted for F-35B. Type 076 has much larger capacity and amphibious capability.
peer_comparisons.video_angle: Purpose-built amphibious carrier vs converted helicopter destroyer - different approaches to regional power projection

peer_comparisons.key_differences: Type 076 adds fixed-wing aviation capability through catapults and arrestor gear, significantly larger and more complex than helicopter-only Type 075. Complementary rather than replacement relationship.
peer_comparisons.video_angle: Evolution of Chinese amphibious warfare - from helicopter assault to integrated air-sea operations

peer_comparisons.key_differences: Type 076 maintains amphibious assault capability while CdG is pure aircraft carrier with larger air wing. Both use catapults but Type 076 uses EMALS vs steam catapults.
peer_comparisons.video_angle: Hybrid amphibious-carrier vs conventional carrier - specialization vs multi-mission flexibility
